page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-60 is a general-purpose server instance powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9B14 processor based on the x86_64 architecture. It features 60 virtual CPUs, derived from 30 physical cores with 2 threads per core, and is equipped with 240 GB of RAM, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, and it offers zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong capabilities in multi-core processing and memory operations. The instance ranks in the top 25% for stress-ng multi-core CPU performance, Passmark CPU score, and Geekbench multi-core metrics. It also demonstrates strong performance in specialized tasks such as software compilation with Clang, ray tracing, image processing, and text processing. Cryptographic and vector calculations are supported by hardware flags including AVX-512 and AES.

Memory performance is mixed, showing strong bandwidth for cached small-block reads but average throughput for larger uncached blocks. Database operations, such as Redis SET operations, and LLM inference for smaller models show strong execution speeds, while static web serving and larger LLM prompt processing fall into the average tier. This profile makes the instance highly suitable for multi-threaded workloads, software development pipelines, database operations, and general-purpose enterprise applications that require dedicated compute resources without local storage dependencies.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-60 is a general-purpose server instance configured with 60 vCPUs and 240 GB of RAM. Powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9B14 processor with 30 physical cores, this x86_64 architecture server delivers strong multi-core performance, as evidenced by top-tier results in stress-ng, Geekbench, and Passmark CPU benchmarks. The hardware features a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. It excels in multi-threaded tasks, software compilation, and database operations, showing strong Redis SET performance and efficient small-block memory bandwidth. This instance is well-suited for enterprise applications, CI/CD pipelines, and medium-scale database workloads requiring reliable, dedicated compute resources.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-60 is a general-purpose instance featuring 60 vCPUs, 240 GB RAM, and a dedicated AMD EPYC 9B14 CPU, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-60 is a general-purpose server with 60 vCPUs and 240 GB RAM, powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9B14 processor.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose server featuring sixty virtual cores and dedicated AMD EPYC processing for demanding multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated AMD EPYC 9B14 processor with 60 vCPUs and 30 physical cores
240 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core
Strong multi-core CPU, software compilation, and database benchmark performance
No local storage or GPU accelerators included in the hardware profile
Best suited for multi-threaded enterprise workloads, CI/CD pipelines, and databases
